testcase.name: test_recruiter_dashboard

failure.message: AssertionError: missing key interviews assert 'interviews' in {'interviews_this_week': 2, 'open_jobs': 3, 'pipeline': [{'count': 1, 'stage': 'offered'}, {'count': 2, 'stage': 'applied'}, {'count': 2, 'stage': 'interview'}, {'count': 1, 'stage': 'screened'}, {'count': 1, 'stage': 'rejected'}], 'recent_jobs': [{'created_at': '2026-06-01T18:03:43.508921+00:00', 'id': 'ac8e3e2b-50c2-443b-a8c4-cc3e0bb84ce5', 'status': 'closed', 'title': 'TEST_Closed'}, {'created_at': '2026-06-01T18:03:41.964468+00:00', 'id': '62b47f9e-6bce-42b2-b0d7-899c7b7f2c24', 'status': 'open', 'title': 'TEST_Engineer'}, {'created_at': '2026-06-01T17:55:52.019339+00:00', 'id': '9c58ec09-4361-462f-92e8-b098aa115fb7', 'status': 'open', 'title': 'People Operations Specialist'}, {'created_at': '2026-06-01T17:55:52.019333+00:00', 'id': '0708a4e8-8bfc-42f7-a226-59d3eee2bc4c', 'status': 'open', 'title': 'Senior Frontend Engineer'}], ...}

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration2.py:309: in test_recruiter_dashboard assert k in d, f"missing key {k}" E AssertionError: missing key interviews E assert 'interviews' in {'interviews_this_week': 2, 'open_jobs': 3, 'pipeline': [{'count': 1, 'stage': 'offered'}, {'count': 2, 'stage': 'applied'}, {'count': 2, 'stage': 'interview'}, {'count': 1, 'stage': 'screened'}, {'count': 1, 'stage': 'rejected'}], 'recent_jobs': [{'created_at': '2026-06-01T18:03:43.508921+00:00', 'id': 'ac8e3e2b-50c2-443b-a8c4-cc3e0bb84ce5', 'status': 'closed', 'title': 'TEST_Closed'}, {'created_at': '2026-06-01T18:03:41.964468+00:00', 'id': '62b47f9e-6bce-42b2-b0d7-899c7b7f2c24', 'status': 'open', 'title': 'TEST_Engineer'}, {'created_at': '2026-06-01T17:55:52.019339+00:00', 'id': '9c58ec09-4361-462f-92e8-b098aa115fb7', 'status': 'open', 'title': 'People Operations Specialist'}, {'created_at': '2026-06-01T17:55:52.019333+00:00', 'id': '0708a4e8-8bfc-42f7-a226-59d3eee2bc4c', 'status': 'open', 'title': 'Senior Frontend Engineer'}], ...}
